requirement_topic.en: LIBNOR / IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: LIBNOR / IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏逆变器安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: LIBNOR / IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏逆變器安全證據

summary.en: LIBNOR is Lebanon's national standards institution and Lebanese standards (NL) may adopt or reference IEC standards. For PV inverters, the core international safety evidence is IEC 62109-1 for general requirements and IEC 62109-2 for particular inverter requirements. Importers and installers should confirm whether the exact inverter, bundled AC/DC protection components, plugs, cables, or battery-related accessories fall within a regulated conformity route or specific Lebanese standard. In practice, IEC 62109-1/-2 test certificates for the exact model or model family are the safety baseline expected by sophisticated Lebanese importers, EPCs, insurers, and project owners, especially for hybrid rooftop systems with battery storage.
summary.zh: LIBNOR是黎巴嫩国家标准机构，黎巴嫩标准（NL）可能采用或引用IEC标准。对于光伏逆变器，核心国际安全证据为IEC 62109-1通用要求和IEC 62109-2逆变器特殊要求。进口商和安装商应确认具体逆变器、随附交流/直流保护部件、插头、电缆或电池相关附件是否落入受监管合格评定路径或具体黎巴嫩标准范围。实践中，特定型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2测试证书，是成熟黎巴嫩进口商、EPC、保险方和项目业主通常期待的安全基线，特别是带电池储能的混合屋顶系统。
summary.zht: LIBNOR是黎巴嫩國家標準機構，黎巴嫩標準（NL）可能採用或引用IEC標準。對於光伏逆變器，核心國際安全證據為IEC 62109-1通用要求和IEC 62109-2逆變器特殊要求。進口商和安裝商應確認具體逆變器、隨附交流/直流保護部件、插頭、電纜或電池相關附件是否落入受監管合格評定路徑或具體黎巴嫩標準範圍。實務中，特定型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2測試證書，是成熟黎巴嫩進口商、EPC、保險方和項目業主通常期待的安全基線，特別是帶電池儲能的混合屋頂系統。

standards_or_laws: LIBNOR Lebanese standards (NL) and conformity route for regulated products
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Applicable battery, DC isolator, surge-protection, wiring, and installation requirements for hybrid systems

summary.en: China's PV inverter evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and voluntary Chinese certification or test reports. These files can support technical review, but they are China domestic baselines and are not automatically accepted as LIBNOR conformity or IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence. Some Chinese manufacturers also hold IEC CB or third-party IEC 62109 reports; those are more relevant to Lebanon due diligence than GB/T-only files, but the model scope, factory, critical components, and report validity still need checking.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004以及中国自愿性认证或测试报告。这些文件可支持技术审查，但属于中国国内基准，不会自动被视为LIBNOR合格评定或IEC 62109-1/-2证据。部分中国制造商还持有IEC CB或第三方IEC 62109报告；这些材料相较仅有GB/T文件更适合黎巴嫩尽调，但仍需核查型号范围、工厂、关键元件和报告有效性。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004以及中國自願性認證或測試報告。這些文件可支持技術審查，但屬於中國國內基準，不會自動被視為LIBNOR合格評定或IEC 62109-1/-2證據。部分中國製造商還持有IEC CB或第三方IEC 62109報告；這些材料相較僅有GB/T文件更適合黎巴嫩盡調，但仍需核查型號範圍、工廠、關鍵元件和報告有效性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China GB/T or NB/T report is not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence or a product-specific LIBNOR conformity determination. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports covering the exact inverter model or family, critical component lists, labels, installation manuals, AC/DC protection ratings, battery operating limits, and country-parameter configuration records. Confirm with the Lebanese importer whether any regulated-product conformity or documentary check applies at import.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T或NB/T报告不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据或具体产品的LIBNOR合格评定判断。应准备覆盖具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2证书和报告、关键元件清单、标签、安装手册、交流/直流保护额定值、电池运行限制及国家参数配置记录。应与黎巴嫩进口商确认进口环节是否适用任何受监管产品合格评定或文件核查。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T或NB/T報告不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據或具體產品的LIBNOR合格評定判斷。應準備覆蓋具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2證書和報告、關鍵元件清單、標籤、安裝手冊、交流/直流保護額定值、電池運行限制及國家參數配置記錄。應與黎巴嫩進口商確認進口環節是否適用任何受監管產品合格評定或文件核查。

mandatory_status.target: Product- and route-specific: LIBNOR conformity may be mandatory for regulated products or components; IEC 62109-1/-2 is the practical safety baseline for PV inverter due diligence and project acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 are China-side baseline / certification-programme evidence and are not automatically accepted as Lebanon LIBNOR or IEC safety evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Lebanon, treat IEC 62109-1/-2 as the core PV inverter safety evidence and confirm the product-specific LIBNOR route with the importer. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 files do not automatically prove Lebanon conformity. Hybrid solar-plus-battery systems need additional care around AC/DC protection, battery limits, backup transfer design, manuals, labels, and commissioning records.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于黎巴嫩，应将IEC 62109-1/-2视为光伏逆变器核心安全证据，并由进口商确认具体产品的LIBNOR路径。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964文件不会自动证明黎巴嫩合格。太阳能加电池混合系统还需额外关注交流/直流保护、电池限制、备用电源转换设计、说明书、标签和调试记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於黎巴嫩，應將IEC 62109-1/-2視為光伏逆變器核心安全證據，並由進口商確認具體產品的LIBNOR路徑。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964文件不會自動證明黎巴嫩合格。太陽能加電池混合系統還需額外關注交流/直流保護、電池限制、備用電源轉換設計、說明書、標籤和調試記錄。
